title: The Minimum Wages (Fixation) (Repeal) Ordinance, 1977
description: An Ordinance to repeal the Minimum Wages (Fixation) Ordinance, 1969. WHEREAS it is expedient to repeal the Minimum Wages (Fixation) Ordinance, 1969 (E.P.

provisions.title: 1. Short title and commencement
provisions.content:
1. (1) This Ordinance may be called the Minimum Wages (Fixation) (Repeal) Ordinance, 1977 .
(2) It shall be deemed to have come into force on the 6th day of November, 1973.

provisions.title: 2. Repeal of E.P. Ord. X of 1969
provisions.content: 2. The Minimum Wages (Fixation) Ordinance, 1969 (E.P. Ord. X of 1969), is hereby repealed.
